nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.task_description: Close the gap: when formal-scope-scan finds no matching modules, the quick workflow planner should evaluate whether the task warrants a new formal model and can declare formal_artifacts: create even with empty FORMAL_SPEC_CONTEXT
nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.approach: Modify the quick workflow planner to evaluate when formal-scope-scan returns empty results and allow formal_artifacts: create declarations with empty FORMAL_SPEC_CONTEXT when the task warrants a new formal model.
out_of_scope: Implementing the actual new formal model creation or code generation
Changing the formal-scope-scan search algorithm or matching logic
Creating new formal verification tools or TLA+/Alloy templates
Modifying the formal model validation or gate-checking process
Backfilling existing tasks with formal models for tasks that previously had empty context
